description: Verify baseline builds and add cdk-assertions dependency to pom.xml, then enable the CDK test
steps: Run 'mvn compile' to verify the project compiles cleanly with current dependencies
Add the software.amazon.awscdk:assertions dependency (version ${cdk.version}, scope test) to pom.xml after the existing constructs dependency

Rewrite src/test/java/com/myorg/CdkBaseTest.java to uncomment/enable a basic test that creates a CdkBaseStack and calls Template.fromStack(stack) to verify the stack synthesizes without errors. Do NOT assert specific resources yet since the stack is empty - just verify Template.fromStack succeeds (proving assertions library works).
Run 'mvn test' to confirm the test passes with the new assertions dependency
acceptance_criteria: pom.xml contains software.amazon.awscdk:assertions dependency with version ${cdk.version} and scope test
CdkBaseTest.java has at least one uncommented @Test method that uses Template.fromStack
Running 'mvn test' passes with no failures
